"'''''Planet of the Mists'''''" is an adventure supplement published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. It was written by [[Nigel D. Findley]] and published in [[1992]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Plot summary==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] Agents accidentally discover an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] factory plant run by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Vost Tyne]]. Can they arm the local natives to repulse the Imperials before they poison the world beyond repair?
